message:
fix: add ❯ Try ready indicator for agent prompt detection

Claude Code sometimes displays "❯ Try" instead of "│ > Try" in its
welcome prompt. Add this as an additional ready indicator pattern.

Inspired by PR #3 (closed per contribution policy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -319,6 +319,7 @@ def is_claude_ready(self, content: str) -> bool:
             ("cwd:" in content and "Welcome to Claude" in content),  # Working directory shown
             ("Bypassing Permissions" in content and "│ >" in content),  # May appear with prompt
             ("│ >" in content and "─╯" in content),  # Prompt box bottom border
+            ("❯ Try " in content),  # Alternative prompt suggestion indicator
         ]
         return any(ready_indicators)
